failures.description: The required catalog lookup failed because the catalog service timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the product evidence needed to answer whether item 1507389580 has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch tool call with concrete arguments. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms, with type CatalogServiceTimeoutError and infra=catalog-service http POST. This is not a malformed invocation, not a guardrail/access block, and not a misunderstanding of the user intent. The failure was not resolved later; the executor and evaluator only reported that the task could not be completed.
